hypothesis: If AMDEN’s score network is co-trained with a force-matching loss on forces from a 1% ab initio-relaxed subset of each dataset, then standard diffusion denoising without HMC will reproduce the correct cooling-rate energy ordering for amorphous Si and produce MEG samples whose Young’s moduli deviate by no more than 10% from targets, while requiring at most half as many model evaluations as HMC denoising.
